abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

abilities.name: On the Move
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may move up to 3", ignoring other models.

abilities.name: Shields Up
abilities.text: Friendly models within 2" of this model targeted by a (missile) action increase their final duel total by 1.

actions.name: Arcane Deflection
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack receives a raise, move enemies within 1" of this model up to 2" in any direction.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

actions.name: Defiant Arrival
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Place this model anywhere within range. If this model changed elevations with this action, move enemy models within 1" of this model up to 2" in any direction.

triggers.name: Arcane Resonance
triggers.text: Friendly models within (aura)1" of this model gain a Shielded token.

actions.name: Tenacity
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Discard a card. This model heals 2.
